channel.title: White House
channel.description: Official White House news and press releases

item.title: President Biden Announces New Infrastructure Initiative
item.description: The White House today announced a sweeping new infrastructure initiative focused on bridge repairs across the United States.

item.title: Readout of Meeting with Tech CEOs
item.description: President met with technology leaders to discuss AI safety and innovation.

item.title: Statement on Semiconductor Manufacturing
item.description: The Administration announced additional funding under the CHIPS and Science Act for domestic semiconductor fabrication facilities.
